sketches.mechanism: Ownership move semantics: passing a non-Copy value consumes it, and any later use is a compile-time error.
sketches.resonance: What has truly been given away cannot still be kept by the giver.

sketches.mechanism: An uninhabited type with an empty case permits a total-looking function from impossibility to any type.
sketches.resonance: From a place no one can enter, every promise is safe because none can be demanded.

sketches.mechanism: CHECK constraints accept TRUE and UNKNOWN, so comparisons involving NULL can satisfy a rule without proving it.
sketches.resonance: What cannot be known is not rejected; uncertainty is allowed to remain.
